source.description: A six-panel raster marker contact sheet generated for the locked June 2 Doodlea.day backfill slug, then cropped into step frames and the finished master.
source.notes: The sheet keeps one face-free cartoon stapler with no text, labels, arrows, sticker border, or badge frame.

process_strategy: The stapler is built from the top shell, base, hinge, staple slot, small feet, marker fills, and shadow before the final only thickens outlines and cleans existing fills.

final_elements.name: bottom base
final_elements.description: A flatter base underneath the top shell.

final_elements.name: front nose
final_elements.description: A squared front end where the staple exits.

final_elements.name: rear hinge
final_elements.description: A small hinge shape at the back.

final_elements.name: staple slot and feet
final_elements.description: A small staple slot near the front and tiny rubber feet under the base.

final_elements.name: teal and coral marker fill
final_elements.description: Teal fill on the top shell and coral accents on the base or nose.

final_elements.name: purple ground shadow
final_elements.description: A small marker shadow below the stapler.

frames.visible_job: Places the rounded top shell and flatter bottom base.
Adds the front nose and clarifies how the top meets the base.
Adds the rear hinge and cleans the back contour.
Adds the front staple slot and tiny base feet.
Adds teal and coral marker fills on existing stapler parts and a purple ground shadow.

final_step.visible_job: Only thickens the existing black outlines, evens marker fills, clarifies the nose, hinge, slot, feet, and shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on existing color areas

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
